quotes.verbatim_quote: *You are to use the same fingering, up and down the fingerboard.
quotes.why_load_bearing: States the load-bearing position-system rule: a single fingering shape for a run is transposed by simple position-shift, which is how Baker turns one learned pattern into a 12-key vocabulary.

quotes.verbatim_quote: use the same fingering going up and down the fingerboard.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Reiterates the invariant-fingering doctrine for dominant 7th/9th runs — the mechanical key to executing Baker's chromatic transposition drill at tempo.

quotes.verbatim_quote:
Now that you have your key runs in your head, — of course, I know that you haven’t mastered them yet, but you

should at least know where to find any run that I tell you.
your guitar, you’re not ready for this lesson.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Sets the gating criterion before the blues lessons: locate any named run anywhere on the neck on demand. Without this recall the blues solos that follow can't be executed.

quotes.verbatim_quote: The Biues play a very important part in modern jazz, so we are going to start our solo work with blues patterns.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Declares blues as the entry vehicle for all solo work in the method, motivating why the next several lessons are blues-form-centric.

quotes.verbatim_quote:
The keys that the blues are played in mostly, are: —F, G, A’, BS and C. So these are the keys that you are to
concentrate on for now. These simple patterns that I have written out in the next few lessons are to be trans-
posed to all five of these keys.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Identifies the five horn-friendly blues keys that constrain the transposition drill for the blues solos, narrowing the all-keys mandate to a practical subset for this section.

quotes.verbatim_quote:
Now I am using these runs just as they were in the exercise, so all you have to
do is to find the right one.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Confirms that the blues solos are built from the exact runs of Lessons 27-30 with no modification, which is how the exercise vocabulary directly becomes improvisational material.
